posts.author: inny12 (Jacob Inerfield)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently as an admin/ first user, I am unable to view all the information that is held in the platform. I would like to request the creation of a “master user” to access all workspaces and boards whether private or open, which sits above the “admin”.

As a business we require an ability to view and understand what information is held within our platform. This will ensure we are able to report on all boards (especially if in locked/ private workspaces)

What are you trying to achieve

Visibility of all information held within an enterprise account for a business
